posts.author: blue5707
posts.title: Teddy Roosevelt presidential library opens July 4 in Dakota badlands, 107 years after his death.

linkEmbed.description: Roosevelt was a native New Yorker, but he moved to the North Dakota territory in 1884 to grieve the same-day, Valentine's Day deaths of his wife and mother.
